author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Variations on a Cosmic Tour | #AventurineWaveflair
"Friends, we meet again! I just wrapped up a sponsored shoot, and wow, keeping a smile plastered to my face for the camera is no easy feat. But now that I've been promoted to P46, I can finally go on vacation. Want to relax and enjoy your time with me? I guarantee you'll have an unforgettable getaway."

The grand festival illuminates the coast, while a storm brews amidst euphoria.
Secret orders in hand, he steps back into the eye of the storm to shake up this long holiday—
When treacherous waves subsume his figure, how will he emerge as the game changer?



#HonkaiStarRail
#StarRail
#AventurineWaveflair

author: Honkai: Star Rail
text:
Variations on a Cosmic Tour | #RobinSummeretto
"It's nice to see you again. The weather in Astropolis is wonderful, and the moist breeze is filled with the scent of sunshine... I'm hoping to gather inspiration for a new song. Would you like to take a stroll together on the beach and listen to the sounds of sea conchs?"

Soaring clearest skies and bluest oceans, wings sweep up the sea spray, transforming it into a new melody.
Following the lingering echoes of memory, she embraces the unexpected along the way, seeking inspiration for a melodic variation—
Beyond the melody, how else can the Harmony sing?



#HonkaiStarRail
#StarRail
#RobinSummeretto
